name: bherila/genai-laravel
description: Provider-agnostic GenAI client for Laravel: Gemini, AWS Bedrock, and more

suggest.dompdf/dompdf: Required together with phpoffice/phpword to render DOC / DOCX / ODT / RTF to PDF before sending — preserves formatting and lets providers use their native PDF pipelines (Gemini vision, Anthropic document blocks). Not loaded if absent.
suggest.phpoffice/phpspreadsheet: Enables automatic XLSX / XLS / ODS / CSV → plain-text conversion when sending spreadsheet files to Anthropic or Gemini (^4|^5). Not loaded if absent.
suggest.phpoffice/phpword: Enables automatic DOC / DOCX / ODT / RTF → PDF conversion (when dompdf/dompdf is also installed) before sending to Anthropic or Gemini. Not loaded if absent.
